title: Parthenon
description: Log-centric observability dashboard for the Parthenon platform.

panels.title: Platform Status
panels.description: Overall platform health based on running container count

panels.title: Last Restart
panels.description: Container restarts in the last hour

panels.title: Error Count
panels.description: Total error log lines across all containers in selected time range

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Errors per minute (5m rolling average)

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: Average CPU usage across all Parthenon containers

panels.title: Memory Usage
panels.description: Total container memory as percentage of host memory

panels.title: CPU by Service
panels.description: CPU usage per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Memory by Service
panels.description: Working set memory per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Memory vs Limit
panels.description: Memory usage as percentage of container limit

panels.title: Restarts (24h)
panels.description: Container restart count in the last 24 hours

panels.title: Network RX
panels.description: Network receive rate per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Network TX
panels.description: Network transmit rate per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Disk I/O Read
panels.description: Disk read rate per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Disk I/O Write
panels.description: Disk write rate per Tier 1 service

panels.title: Request Rate by Status
panels.description: HTTP request rate grouped by status code

panels.title: Status Code Distribution
panels.description: Proportional breakdown of HTTP status codes

panels.title: Top 10 Paths
panels.description: Most frequently requested URL paths

panels.title: Top Error Paths

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(path, status) (count_over_time({job="apache", log_type="access"} | pattern `<ip> - <_> [<_>] "<method> <path> <_>" <status> <bytes>` | status >= 400 [$__range])))

panels.description: URL paths returning 4xx/5xx status codes

panels.title: Apache Error Log
panels.description: Apache error log stream, filtered by search text

panels.title: Apache Access Log
panels.description: Apache access log stream, filtered by search text and status code

panels.title: Error Rate by Level
panels.description: Laravel error log lines by severity level

panels.title: Top 10 Exceptions
panels.description: Most frequently thrown exception types

panels.title: Log Volume by Level
panels.description: All PHP log lines grouped by level

panels.title: Recent Errors
panels.description: Latest ERROR and CRITICAL log entries with message

panels.title: Live Log Stream
panels.description: PHP/Laravel log stream filtered by level and search text

panels.title: Request Rate by Status
panels.description: Uvicorn request rate by HTTP status code

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Error log line frequency for the AI service

panels.title: Top Error Patterns
panels.description: Most frequent error patterns (Ollama, RAG, SapBERT, etc.)

panels.title: Ollama & RAG Activity
panels.description: RAG pipeline component activity over time

panels.title: Live Log Stream
panels.description: AI service log stream filtered by level and search text

panels.title: Slow Queries (>100ms)
panels.description: Count of queries taking >100ms (requires log_min_duration_statement=100)

panels.title: Top Slow Queries

targets.expr: topk(10, avg_over_time({job="postgresql"} |= "duration:" | regexp `duration: (?P<duration>\d+\.\d+) ms\s+statement: (?P<query>.+)` | unwrap duration [$__range]) by (query))

panels.description: Queries ranked by average execution time

panels.title: Database Errors
panels.description: PostgreSQL error and warning frequency

panels.title: Docker Postgres Log
panels.description: Docker PostgreSQL container log stream

panels.title: Host PG17 Log
panels.description: Host PostgreSQL 17 log stream (production database)

panels.title: Error Count by Service
panels.description: Error count per Tier 2 service in selected time range

panels.title: Log Volume by Service
panels.description: Log line volume per Tier 2 service

panels.title: Live Log Stream
panels.description: Tier 2 service logs filtered by service selector, level, and search text
